# Jatin Thummar — Frontend Engineer & Mobile App Developer

> Jatin Thummar is a Frontend Engineer based in India, specializing in building scalable cross-platform mobile applications for Android, iOS, and Web using React Native, Expo, TypeScript, and Next.js. He has production experience in e-commerce, Shopify app development, and mobile-first product engineering.

## About

Jatin Thummar builds production-grade cross-platform apps with React Native, Expo, TypeScript, and Next.js. He focuses on clean code, thoughtful frontend architecture, and smooth user experiences.

- Role: Frontend Engineer & Mobile App Developer
- Company: The Korean Fashion — building and scaling a cross-platform e-commerce mobile app
- Location: India
- Specializations: Cross-platform mobile development, React Native, Expo, Shopify mobile apps, e-commerce, frontend architecture, TypeScript
- Tech stack: React Native, Expo, TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Astro, Node.js, Git, Vite, GitHub Actions

## Links

- Website: https://jatinthummar.github.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/JatinThummar
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jatinthummar
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/jatinthummarx

## Pages

- [Home](https://jatinthummar.github.io/): Portfolio landing page with intro, social links, and recent blog posts.
- [About](https://jatinthummar.github.io/about/): Background, current work, projects, tech stack, and contact info.
- [Blog](https://jatinthummar.github.io/blog/): All blog posts on frontend development, resources, and learning.

## Projects

- **FlipBitz — Feed App** (Personal Project): Cross-platform feed app for iOS, Android & Web built with React Native and Expo. Real-time news feeds, dynamic color themes, and light/dark mode.
- **LEO Mobile App Builder** (Lead Developer · Softpulse Infotech · 2023–2024): No-code mobile app builder for Shopify stores, built with React Native and Expo. Merchants create and publish their own e-commerce app to iOS and Android — no coding required.
- **As a Man Thinketh** (Personal Project): Static reading experience for James Allen's classic book, built with Astro. Translated into multiple languages including English, Gujarati, and Hindi.

## Blog Posts

- [UI/UX Design Resources for Developers](https://jatinthummar.github.io/blog/ui-ux-design-resources-for-developers/): A curated collection of tools, courses, inspiration sites, books, and communities to help you learn UI/UX design.
- [AI Tools & Learning Resources](https://jatinthummar.github.io/blog/ai-tools-and-learning-resources/): Courses, blogs, newsletters, and people to follow for learning AI engineering, prompt design, and building with LLMs.
- [Thinkers & Writers Worth Reading](https://jatinthummar.github.io/blog/thinkers-and-writers-worth-reading/): Founders, thinkers, and writers who changed how I see tech, startups, and life.
- [Frontend Tools & Learning Resources](https://jatinthummar.github.io/blog/frontend-tools-and-learning-resources/): Tools, communities, and platforms that helped me grow as a frontend developer.
- [Developers & Engineers to Follow](https://jatinthummar.github.io/blog/developers-and-engineers-to-follow/): Programmers who've contributed to and built some of the best tech — follow them to level up.
- [Engineering Blogs from Top Teams](https://jatinthummar.github.io/blog/engineering-blogs-from-top-teams/): Blogs that help you think at scale — how top teams build, ship, and solve real problems.
